case_for: Stafford has cleared 12 points in three of his last six games, showing he retains upside as a starting NFL quarterback despite an unusually low 4.0 pt pregame projection.
case_against: The pregame projection of just 4.0 points signals a significant expected limiting factor (likely game script, opponent, or health concern), and his recent volatility includes multiple sub-7 point floors including his most recent outing.
